recommendations.title: Missing H1 Tags
recommendations.recommendation: Every page should have exactly one H1 tag that describes the main topic

recommendations.title: Low ORB Semantic Space Score
recommendations.description: 13 pages cover less than 65% of their expected semantic space
recommendations.recommendation: Add missing entities, questions, supporting subtopics, and schema-aligned language

recommendations.title: Repeated Template or Boilerplate Pattern
recommendations.description: 1 repeated page template clusters were detected
recommendations.recommendation: Differentiate page body copy, titles, meta descriptions, and section structure for pages sharing a template

recommendations.title: Potential Orphan Pages
recommendations.description: 13 crawled pages have no incoming links from other crawled pages
recommendations.recommendation: Link these pages from navigation, hub pages, or related body content

recommendations.title: Thin Content
recommendations.recommendation: Expand thin pages with comprehensive, valuable content

recommendations.title: Weak Semantic Coverage
recommendations.description: 13 pages have shallow topical depth or low semantic coverage
recommendations.recommendation: Expand pages around the primary topic, related entities, questions, and supporting subtopics

recommendations.title: Weak Internal Link Distribution
recommendations.description: 13 pages have fewer than two internal outgoing links
recommendations.recommendation: Add contextual internal links to relevant service, category, and supporting content pages

recommendations.title: Schema Markup Opportunity
recommendations.recommendation: Add schema markup (JSON-LD) for rich snippets and ORB-readable business context
